channel.title: Retro Pixel Press
channel.description: Fresh takes for retro game collectors and speedrunners.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: hidden snes gems
item.description: The persistent myths around hidden snes gems, stress-tested against what retro game collectors and speedrunners actually report.

item.title: Tooling Up: The Essential Kit for Speed Demons
item.description: Boost your speedrun game with the right tools

item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the indie community this week.

item.title: Reviving Retro Consoles: A Cost-Effective Approach
item.description: Breathe new life into old consoles

item.description: Boost your speedrun potential

item.title: "retro game restoration" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about retro game restoration through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your indie questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the indie questions retro game collectors and speedrunners keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in preservation with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest preservation adjustments that retro game collectors and speedrunners report mattering most.

item.description: The persistent myths around retro game restoration, stress-tested against what retro game collectors and speedrunners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your hardware in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying hardware project for retro game collectors — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.description: Upgrade your retro console with ease
